summary: The user is seeking tools and apps to help organize their cleaning schedule and tasks, ultimately deciding to use Habitica for tracking their cleaning routine and implementing the "one-touch rule" for productivity. They plan to set daily and weekly tasks in Habitica and utilize its rewards system to stay motivated.
facts: The user has been following a daily 30-minute cleaning routine for about 3 weeks, which has positively impacted their productivity and energy levels. The user plans to use Habitica to track their daily cleaning routine and the "one-touch rule." The user intends to apply the one-touch rule to tasks like putting away dirty dishes immediately after meals and responding to simple emails as soon as they read them. The user is considering creating a "Someday" folder for tasks that don't require immediate attention but may be useful in the future. The user plans to reward themselves with a favorite meal or activity after completing a certain number of days or tasks successfully following the one-touch rule. The user is contemplating whether to set up a general "daily cleaning" habit in Habitica or create separate habits for specific cleaning tasks like "make bed" or "wipe down kitchen counters."
